/usr/bin/c++ -pg -O2 -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -pg -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/GL2D_ECS_BENCHMARK.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/GL2D_ECS_BENCHMARK.dir/tools/ecs_benchmark.cpp.o -o GL2D_ECS_BENCHMARK  libgl2d_engine.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLEW.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.4 libstb_image.a
